_comment: Copy to config.local.json (gitignored) and edit. Each service may set any of process/url/port. Omit the file entirely to run with no service checks.
_explain_comment: Optional. Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama/OpenAI/Gemini/OpenRouter/LM Studio). apiKeyEnv = NAME of an env var holding the key; omit for keyless local. Enable with -Explain.
